Entry.Name: Viscount Ravi
Entry.Description: The Viscount of Kaiten is famed for his prowess in battle.

Entry.Name: Lukesh
Entry.Description: Is this field used at all?

Entry.Name: Antor
Entry.Warcry: That stain will take forever to get out!

Entry.Name: Korznik
Entry.Warcry: Hundreds have died in my wake. You're just a number to me.

Entry.Name: Cerlais
Entry.Warcry: So easy an NPC can do it!

Entry.Name: Derandt
Entry.Warcry: Go for the eyes, Boo, go for the eyes!

Entry.Name: Hawke
Entry.Description: Tim the Sim puts the R in Rogue.

Entry.Name: Isabela
Entry.Warcry: If we kill them, we get their stuff!
